ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patient_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the patient group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, researcher, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (comma-separated list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Patient identifier */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  "systolic_bp" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure */,
  "diastolic_bp" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body mass index (BMI) */,
  "fractional_shortening" REAL /* Fractional shortening of the left ventricle */,
  "epss" REAL /* E-point septal separation */,
  "lvdd" REAL /* Left ventricular diastolic dimension */,
  "wall_motion_score" INTEGER /* Wall motion score */,
  "wall_motion_index" REAL /* Wall motion index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the medical condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each patient group
Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, researcher, administrator)
Unique identifier for each health metric record
Date when the metrics were recorded
Fractional shortening of the left ventricle
Unique identifier for each medical condition
